ext.description: EEG-correlated developer activity tracking with privacy controls and brain-state insights.
cmd.checkValidationPrompt: NeuroSkill: Check for Validation Prompt Now
cfg.focusCodeLens: Show focus score annotations on files edited during low focus
cfg.breakCoach: Personalized break timing based on your EEG focus cycle
cfg.struggleBridge: Suggest AI assist when struggle is detected
cfg.flowTriggers: Show personal flow trigger insights in sidebar
cfg.focusCommits: Score git commits with focus level and human/AI labels
cfg.taskRouter: Suggest task types based on current focus level
cfg.eegHeatmap: Show EEG focus timeline heatmap in sidebar
cfg.excludePaths: Glob patterns of file paths to exclude from tracking. Add patterns for client repos or sensitive workspaces.
cfg.notifications: How loudly NeuroSkill speaks up: 'all' shows every coaching prompt, 'critical' only shows alerts requiring action (default), 'off' silences everything in favour of subtle status bar badges.
cfg.notifications.all: Show all coaching prompts (fatigue, breaks, struggle suggestions, etc.)
cfg.notifications.critical: Only show alerts that require user action (default — quietest useful setting)
cfg.notifications.off: Silence all toasts; alerts surface as a colored badge on the status bar
cfg.systemNotifications: Escalate notifications to OS-native system notifications. 'never' uses VSCode toasts only, 'critical' escalates only urgent alerts, 'always' uses the OS for every notification.
cfg.systemNotifications.critical: Use OS-native notifications only for critical alerts
cfg.systemNotifications.always: Use OS-native notifications for every alert
